creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-12-13 10:13:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/portmanager Makefile 
    sysutils/portmanager/files 
                               patch-portmanager__patch-bsd.port.mk-0.3.6 
  Added files:
    sysutils/portmanager/files 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__MGPMrGetPortName.c 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__MGPMrInitialize.c 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__MGPMrPortBrokeCheck.c 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__MGPMrReadConfigure.c 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__MGPMrShowLeavesDelete.c 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__MGPMrUpdate.c 
                               patch-libMGPM__src__libMGPM.h 
                               patch-libMG__src__MGdbAdd.c 
                               patch-libMG__src__MGdbRead.c 
                               patch-libMG__src__Makefile.am 
                               patch-libMG__src__libMG.h 
                               patch-portmanager__portmanager.c 
  Removed files:
    sysutils/portmanager/files patch-0.4.1_1 patch-0.4.1_2 
                               patch-0.4.1_3 patch-0.4.1_4 
                               patch-libMGPM-src-MGPMrGetPortName.c 
                               patch-portmanager.c 
  Log:
  - Using bzip2 in pkg_create by default for a while now. Patch to
    allow removing either .tgz or .tbz temporary pkgs.
  - Refactor the existing patches so that we have one patch per file to ease
    maintenance.
  - Pass maintainership to submitter.
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             ports/106652
  Submitted by:   Robert C. Noland III <rnoland@2hip.net>
